name: Ribbon Finance
description: Ribbon Finance is a DeFi structured products platform that helps users access crypto structured products through automated options strategies. The platform offers Theta Vaults for covered calls and cash-secured puts, Ribbon Earn for yield optimization, and Ribbon Lend for unsecured lending. Ribbon Finance merged with Aevo, a high-performance Layer-2 order-book decentralized exchange for options and perpetuals trading.

offers.name: Theta Vaults
offers.description: Decentralized Options Vaults (DOVs) for covered calls and cash-secured puts strategies

offers.name: Ribbon Earn
offers.description: Yield optimization products for crypto assets

offers.name: Ribbon Lend
offers.description: Uncollateralized lending marketplace for institutional borrowers

offers.name: Aevo Exchange
offers.description: High-performance Layer-2 decentralized exchange for options and perpetuals trading
